description: Fix all code-fixable Play Store blockers: targetSdk, compile errors, account deletion, medical disclaimer, BootReceiver, health permissions XML, test failures, AI calls display

userStories.title: Pin targetSdk=35, fix BootReceiver export, complete health_permissions.xml
acceptanceCriteria: In android/app/build.gradle.kts: change targetSdk from flutter.targetSdkVersion to 35
In AndroidManifest.xml: change BootReceiver android:exported from false to true

In android/app/src/main/res/values/health_permissions.xml: add missing 6 permissions to match all 13 in manifest (HeartRateVariability, RestingHeartRate, OxygenSaturation, Vo2Max, ExerciseSession, TotalCaloriesBurned)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors

userStories.title: Fix compile errors from orphaned files and invalid constants
acceptanceCriteria: Check if lib/features/meals/presentation_v2/ still exists — if so delete it
Check lib/features/dashboard/presentation/dashboard_screen.dart for surfaceContainerLowest usage — fix or remove
Check lib/shared/core/theme/app_theme.dart for invalid constant — fix
Run flutter analyze — must return 0 errors
Run flutter test — check for failures

userStories.title: Add account deletion flow to Settings
acceptanceCriteria: Add Delete Account option to settings_screen.dart under Account section
Tapping shows confirmation dialog: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and all data.
Confirmation calls a delete function that: deletes all wt_* table rows for the user via Supabase RPC, signs out the user, navigates to /login
Create supabase/migrations/ RPC function delete_user_data(user_id) that cascades deletes across wt_profiles, wt_health_metrics, wt_meals, wt_workouts, etc.
Add a note: Data deletion may take up to 30 days to propagate
flutter analyze returns 0 errors

userStories.title: Add medical disclaimer to health recommendation screens
acceptanceCriteria: Add a persistent disclaimer banner or footer to: recovery_score_dashboard_card.dart, progress_tab_screen.dart, daily_view_screen.dart (Plan tab)
Disclaimer text: This app provides wellness suggestions only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Consult your doctor before making health decisions.
Disclaimer is subtle (small text, muted color) but always visible — not dismissable
Add disclaimer to the Insights dashboard screen as well

acceptanceCriteria: Run flutter test and identify all failing tests
Fix each test — update expectations to match current implementation
All tests must pass: flutter test returns 0 failures
